name_en: MiuMiu Mini Shell Handbag/Crossbody Bag is now live!!
name_cn:
MiuMiu Mini Shell Handbag/Crossbody Bag is now live!!
Who can refuse a retro and playful shell bag? The faded leather color and texture paired with a metal belt buckle looks premium and vintage. Made of lambskin with a refined design and a square retro shape.
Switch between hand, underarm, and crossbody carry!
Elegant for commuting, super easy to wear. Join MiuMiu 👧🏻 now!
Size:21X13.5X 8cm
Model:5BP090
